channel.title: GitHub NSIS Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of NSIS in GitHub

item.title: voicemxil/TS2-Starter-Pack
item.description: Resources for optimzed download & setup of The Sims 2: Ultimate Collection.

item.title: bituq/Roshade
item.description: An installation package made in NSIS for installing Reshade presets and shaders to Roblox.

item.title: satisfactorymodding/SatisfactoryModManager
item.description: A mod manager for easy installation of mods and modloader for Satisfactory
